tasks.title: Verify and freeze governance rules
tasks.description: Confirm .cursor/rules and alwaysApply flags match HexCurse sacred constraints and AGENTS.md.
tasks.details: Review base.mdc, mcp-usage.mdc, process-gates.mdc; ensure 10-rule set is coherent.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual review + doctor non-blocking rule count.

tasks.title: Sync DIRECTIVES.md with Taskmaster
tasks.description: Keep Queued/Completed sections mirroring tasks.json; one In Progress directive at a time.
tasks.details: After each task graph change, update DIRECTIVES.md IDs and dependency notes.

tasks.title: Document Taskmaster LLM configuration and no-endpoint fallback
tasks.description: Align .env.example and docs with OpenAI-compatible Taskmaster providers; document agent-curated task graph when parse-prd cannot reach an LLM.
tasks.details: OPENAI_API_KEY + OPENAI_BASE_URL for LM Studio or cloud; never commit .env. When no LLM is available, maintain tasks.json from NORTH_STAR + prd.txt via agent (same outcome as parse-prd).
tasks.testStrategy: Verify .env.example keys; confirm config.json provider entries documented in ARCHITECTURE.

tasks.title: Rebuild Taskmaster task graph from NORTH_STAR and prd.txt
tasks.description: Regenerate tasks covering installer quality, rituals, learning loop, token efficiency, and skill promotion—via parse-prd or equivalent agent curation.
tasks.details: Source: NORTH_STAR.md + .taskmaster/docs/prd.txt. Target: 10–15 tasks, realistic dependencies, priorities high/medium/low.
tasks.testStrategy: task-master list shows 8+ tasks aligned with product; no orphan stub tasks.

tasks.title: Seed memory MCP from docs/MEMORY_SEED.md
tasks.description: Write durable project facts into memory MCP when the server is enabled in Cursor.
tasks.details: Run at session start per AGENTS.md; no secrets in seed content.
tasks.testStrategy: Query memory for seeded keys after write.

tasks.title: Verify MCP servers show green in Cursor
tasks.description: Cross-check Settings > MCP against canonical 17-server inventory and docs/PART0_MCP_TEMPLATE.json.
tasks.details: Log DEGRADED_MODE for any red server; fix env paths (e.g. SEMGREP_PATH, Pampa) per AGENTS Gotchas.
tasks.testStrategy: Screenshot or list of green servers after install.

tasks.title: Commit governance scaffold to Git
tasks.description: Keep governance tree, docs, and .taskmaster under version control with clear commit messages.
tasks.details: Use D[NNN]: description | status convention; never commit .env.
tasks.testStrategy: git status clean after session close.

tasks.title: Confirm product stack and update docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
tasks.description: Replace residual TBD product notes with NORTH_STAR Technology stack; add Product Stack (confirmed) section.
tasks.details: Runtime Node/cursor-governance, file storage, LLM-agnostic Taskmaster, npm distribution, no core SaaS DB.
tasks.testStrategy: Grep ARCHITECTURE for inappropriate TBD; human read of Product Stack section.

tasks.title: Installer correctness: setup.js parity with AGENTS and GOVERNANCE_PARITY
tasks.description: Keep merge, --doctor, --run-hexcurse, template embeds aligned with SESSION_START_PROMPT and embedded agentsMd/sessionStartMd.
tasks.details: Run HEXCURSE_DOCTOR_CI=1 doctor from repo root; npm run test:all in cursor-governance.
tasks.testStrategy: Doctor zero blocking; all tests green.

tasks.title: Validate continual learning loop in a real repo
tasks.description: Dogfood governed sessions until SESSION_LOG, ROLLING_CONTEXT, and .cursor/skills show real accumulated artifacts.
tasks.details: Per NORTH_STAR Current state: prove the self-improving loop beyond empty skills and empty rolling context.
tasks.testStrategy: After N sessions: non-empty skill file or rollup excerpt; memory entries for discoveries.

subtasks.title: Run 5+ governed sessions with SESSION_LOG entries each close

tasks.title: Skill promotion pipeline and PAMPA cadence
tasks.description: Harden agents-memory-updater, skill-promotion-queue.json consumption, and PAMPA re-index after new skills.
tasks.details: Align with CONTINUAL_LEARNING.md and RULE 9 debounce; ensure skills are discoverable via pampa search.
tasks.testStrategy: Promote one skill end-to-end; pampa finds it by keyword.

subtasks.title: Verify continual-learning-index.json mtime vs transcript policy

tasks.title: Token efficiency measurement protocol (session 1 vs session N)
tasks.description: Define how to compare tool-call counts, redundant reads, and context size across sessions in the same repo.
tasks.details: Align with NORTH_STAR Definition of Done and docs/MCP_TOKEN_BUDGET.md; optional script or checklist.
tasks.testStrategy: Documented protocol produces comparable metrics for two sessions.

tasks.title: Session ritual accuracy vs live MCP coordination
tasks.description: Audit SESSION_START_PROMPT and AGENTS.md steps against docs/MCP_COORDINATION.md and actual mcp.json merge.
tasks.details: Ensure 4a–4e and server list match installer output; fix doc drift before shipping.
tasks.testStrategy: Checklist walkthrough of SESSION START without DEGRADED_MODE on core servers.

tasks.title: cursor-governance installer — Windows PowerShell readline + no ora (D014)
tasks.description: Verify readline prompts and console logging in setup.js on Windows; no enquirer/ora regressions.
tasks.details: Prerequisite for D015. Mark done when Windows path is verified.
tasks.testStrategy: Manual: full setup.js prompt flow in PowerShell.

tasks.title: Linux compatibility for cursor-governance installer (D015)
tasks.description: OS-aware Python/pip/uv and paths in setup.js only; no hardcoded Windows paths.
tasks.details: process.platform win32|linux|darwin; path.join; Linux python3/pip3 first per existing directive text.
tasks.testStrategy: node --check setup.js; smoke install on Linux.

tasks.title: Add --parse-prd-via-agent mode to setup.js
tasks.description: Generate tasks.json from PRD via Cursor agent LLM context. No outbound API call from setup.js. Supports --prd, --out, --dry-run, --apply flags. See docs/directives/D-HEXCURSE-AGENT-PARSE-006.md.
